task_title: Evaluation — re-run universe sweep and walk-forward with tuned SMA and MACD parameters

marcus.summary: SMA re-test at fast=20/slow=50 is methodologically clean because the revisit trigger was pre-committed before WF results were analyzed; the universe sweep resets cleanly and the WF instrument-count threshold resets to the new universe gate count. MACD parameters should stay at 17/26/9: changing to 12/26/9 post-WF failure constitutes implicit tuning against the fold structure of the 5 failing instruments. MACD's instrument-count gate failure is a gate-design question (100% retention required), not a parameter question.

priya_plan.plan_summary: Change SMA --fast-period default from 10 to 20 in both cmd files. MACD CLI defaults stay at 12; MACD runs with --macd-fast-period 17 passed explicitly. MACD universe sweep re-run skipped (TASK-0052 results definitive). Evaluation: SMA universe sweep at fast=20/slow=50, apply universe gate, walk-forward if passes. MACD escalated to gate-design reconsideration.
priya_plan.approach: Flag-default change only: --fast-period in cmd/universe-sweep/main.go and cmd/walk-forward/main.go from 10 to 20.

build.build_summary: Changed --fast-period default from 10 to 20 in cmd/universe-sweep/main.go and cmd/walk-forward/main.go. --slow-period was already 50 in both — no change. MACD defaults untouched. main_test.go defaultStrategyParams() uses fastPeriod:10 as a valid test param (not a flag-default assertion) — no update needed.
